title: Live The Adventure | Just Go For It
excerpt: There's a lot going on behind the scenes over here and a lot of adventures I've shared on Instagram as of late. I've been really trying hard to focus on the things that are most important to me, but sometimes…
body:
There's a lot going on behind the scenes over here and a lot of adventures I've shared on Instagram as of late. I've been really trying hard to focus on the things that are most important to me, but sometimes I feel completely overwhelmed. Part of me knows that I have a tendency to take on too much, but the other part of me can't help it! I'm trying my best to balance a lot of things (most of them very exciting and very good) but some things that are unexpected and have knocked me off of my feet a bit. Please know that I would love to update this blog more often than I do and have written many a blog posts in my head while stuck in traffic or on an airplane or even in the shower.

Part of living the life of my dreams is being able to share what I love. I'm dreaming about BIG things coming up. I may need some help and I may need to expand Team Tangerine. So while this isn't exactly a job posting, I wanted to just throw it out into the Universe that if the right person (possibly people) came my way, we may have some work for them to do. Maybe the kind of work that will be someone's dream job and perhaps posting this tiny request on my blog will be just the way to do it.

Lettering on my iPad Pro using the Procreate app. You can see a bit more in this YouTube video.
